title: agent.session.snapshot v1
description: On-demand full state dump for a single registered session. Emitted in response to an agent.session.query.v1 request (or 'nervous session show <id>'). Distinct from heartbeat: heartbeats are periodic+small, snapshots are on-demand+complete. Federates onto pane_id_qualified (primary) and session_id (secondary).

pane_id_qualified.description: Primary durable key: 'zellij:<session_name>:<pane_id>' or 'tmux:<pane_id>'. Optional only because non-pane CLIs may not have it.

session_id.description: Secondary key. The CLI's native session identifier.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp at the moment the snapshot was captured.

project.description: basename of cwd at snapshot time.

model.description: Model identifier currently in use, e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7'.

transcript_path.description: Absolute path to the Claude Code transcript JSONL (or equivalent durable handle for other CLIs). The most durable cross-resume key for Claude sessions specifically.

focus_bead.description: Current bead id claimed by the session, if any.

collaboration_mode.description: Current collaboration mode of this session.

parent_main_session_id.description: session_id of the linked 'main' anchor, if any.

linked_siblings.description: session_ids of currently-linked sibling sessions (peers + council members + subordinates).

epic_id.description: Epic correlation id, if this session is part of an epic.

subagents_in_flight.description: Count of dispatched-but-not-finished subagents/loomies/Task tool calls.

recent_tool_calls.description: Last N tool names invoked (typically last 5).

context_percent.description: Fraction of model context window in use, as a percentage.

healthy.description: Whether the session is making forward progress.

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp at which the session was originally registered.
